changes.description: Removed redundant .trim() call in extractCopilotContentLines. normalizeCopilotLine already returns a trimmed string, so the intermediate `trimmed` variable was unnecessary (DRY).
Renamed `isCodexOrGeminiComplete` to `isPromptBasedComplete` to accurately reflect that the variable now covers 4 tool types (Codex, Gemini, Vibe-Local, Copilot). Updated comment to match.
Reviewed: cleanCopilotResponse correctly reuses normalizeCopilotLine (DRY) and COPILOT_SKIP_PATTERNS. No changes needed.
Reviewed: Clean SRP module with SHA-256 hashing. No changes needed.
Reviewed: COPILOT_SKIP_PATTERNS correctly composes existing patterns. No changes needed.
Reviewed: Copilot branch correctly grouped with opencode in resolveExtractionStartIndex. No changes needed.
Reviewed: Well-structured constants with clear JSDoc. No changes needed.
Reviewed: Correctly imports COPILOT_SEND_ENTER_DELAY_MS from copilot-constants. No changes needed.
Reviewed: Correctly imports COPILOT_SEND_ENTER_DELAY_MS from copilot-constants. No changes needed.
Reviewed: Correctly imports both COPILOT_TEXT_INPUT_DELAY_MS and COPILOT_SEND_ENTER_DELAY_MS. No changes needed.
Reviewed: clearPromptHashCache correctly called in killWorktreeSession. No changes needed.

refactorings_applied: Removed redundant .trim() in extractCopilotContentLines (DRY: normalizeCopilotLine already trims)
Renamed isCodexOrGeminiComplete to isPromptBasedComplete (naming clarity for 4-tool scope)
commits: 6dec87e2: refactor(copilot): improve naming clarity and remove redundant code
message: Refactoring complete. Code was already well-structured following SOLID/DRY principles. Two improvements applied: redundant .trim() removal and misleading variable naming fix. All 5469 tests pass, 0 static analysis errors.
